summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Cybersecurity risks posed by over-the-air tech in autos has analysts concerned
raw_articles.summary: The automotive industry's increasing use of over-the-air technology makes it more susceptible to cyberattacks, analysts say.

raw_articles.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff  that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
raw_articles.summary: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools and nonprofits that support writers and the arts more broadly. So one might expect he'd roll into the company's offices and offer […]

raw_articles.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
raw_articles.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

raw_articles.title: The AI rotation stole the spotlight from a strong start to earnings season
raw_articles.summary: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.

raw_articles.title: Pinecone Introduces Nexus Engine for Compiling Business Context into Structured Data for AI Agents
raw_articles.summary: Now generally available, Pinecone Nexus is a "knowledge engine" for AI agents that transforms enterprise data into a structured layer agents can query directly. It enables teams to ingest and curate business context once for all, making it reusable across agents and reducing token costs while improving accuracy. By Sergio De Simone

raw_articles.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
raw_articles.summary: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.
